product.name: CompText
product.claim: Models are providers. Context is the product. Evidence is the trust layer. CompText is the kernel.
product.description: A local AI orchestration platform for software engineering. This public Space is an experimental, non-executing showcase.

layers.name: Terminal OS / UI
layers.purpose: Human-facing workbench for sessions, workspaces, commands, providers, evidence and run queues.

layers.name: Runtime
layers.purpose: Coordinates runs, plans, verification, retries, queues and replay.

layers.name: Gateway
layers.purpose: Normalizes local provider-compatible message and response routes.

layers.name: Agent Bus
layers.purpose: Coordinates specialized agents as explicit tasks with approval gates.

layers.name: AIR
layers.purpose: Describes intended work before execution: goal, context, tools, constraints, permissions and outputs.

layers.name: Evidence
layers.purpose: Records what actually happened without secrets, raw provider payloads or hidden reasoning.

layers.name: Memory / Knowledge Graph
layers.purpose: Structured workspace knowledge spanning files, functions, tests, runs and evidence.

skills.name: comptext-local-autonomy
skills.boundary: No network, providers, secrets, GitHub writes or servers.

skills.name: comptext-local-verify
skills.purpose: Verify status, subagents, workspace validation and doctor diagnostics.

skills.name: comptext-workspace-validation
skills.purpose: Validate committed workspace examples against strict schemas.
skills.boundary: No active generation, network, databases or providers.

skills.name: comptext-status
skills.purpose: Show file presence and local diagnostic state.

skills.name: workspace-state
skills.purpose: Define future snapshot, delta and reflection-gate concepts.
skills.boundary: No active runtime or interpretability claims.

contracts.name: AIR Plan
contracts.fields: version, intent, goal, context, files, tools, permissions, expected_outputs, metadata

contracts.name: Evidence Event
contracts.fields: event_id, run_id, type, actor, tool, summary, hashes, timestamp, redaction

contracts.name: Run Record
contracts.fields: run_id, air_hash, status, start_time, end_time, event_hashes, metrics
